example_en: We need to collaborate with the marketing team on this project.
example_zh: 我們需要與行銷團隊在這個專案上合作。

example_en: The two companies are negotiating a new partnership.
example_zh: 這兩家公司正在洽談新的合作關係。

example_en: Please confirm your attendance by Friday.
example_zh: 請在週五前確認您的出席情況。

example_en: We will discuss the budget in the next meeting.
example_zh: 我們將在下次會議討論預算。

example_en: All staff members are encouraged to participate in the seminar.
example_zh: 鼓勵所有員工參加研討會。

example_en: The company decided to implement a new policy.
example_zh: 公司決定實施一項新政策。

example_en: The main objective of the meeting is to review quarterly performance.
example_zh: 本次會議的主要目的是檢討季度績效。

example_en: The positive outcome of the negotiations benefited both companies.
example_zh: 談判的正面結果使雙方公司皆受益。

example_en: The company plans to recruit more engineers next year.
example_zh: 公司計劃明年招募更多工程師。

example_en: Three candidates have been shortlisted for the manager position.
example_zh: 已有三位候選人入圍經理職位的最終名單。

example_en: The supervisor will review your performance next week.
example_zh: 主管將於下週審查你的工作表現。

example_en: New staff members must attend orientation training.
example_zh: 新進員工必須參加入職培訓。

example_en: The company offers competitive salary and benefits packages.
example_zh: 公司提供具有競爭力的薪資與福利方案。

example_en: There is currently a vacancy for an office manager.
example_zh: 目前有一個辦公室經理的職缺。

example_en: Employee evaluations take place every six months.
example_zh: 員工評核每六個月進行一次。

example_en: The new advertising campaign increases brand awareness significantly.
example_zh: 新的廣告活動大幅提升了品牌知名度。

example_en: The company is running a promotion on its new line of clothing.
example_zh: 公司正在對其新服裝系列進行促銷。

example_en: They plan to advertise the new product on social media.
example_zh: 他們計劃在社群媒體上為新產品登廣告。

example_en: Customer satisfaction surveys are important for market research.
example_zh: 客戶滿意度調查對市場研究非常重要。

example_en: Our target audience is young professionals.
example_zh: 我們的目標受眾是年輕專業人士。

example_en: The company is known for its strong brand reputation.
example_zh: 該公司以其強大的品牌聲譽而聞名。

example_en: Please sign the contract and return it to the HR department.
example_zh: 請簽署合約並將其寄回人資部門。

example_en: The two parties reached an agreement after long negotiations.
example_zh: 雙方經過長期談判後達成協議。

example_en: We need your signature on this document before we can proceed.
example_zh: 在我們繼續之前，我們需要您在此文件上的簽名。

example_en: You should read the terms and conditions carefully before signing.
example_zh: 簽署前應仔細閱讀條款和條件。

example_en: There is a penalty for late payment of the invoice.
example_zh: 逾期支付發票將面臨罰款。

example_en: The company will undergo a financial audit next month.
example_zh: 公司下個月將進行財務審計。

example_en: We need to stay within the budget for this marketing campaign.
example_zh: 我們需要將這次行銷活動控制在預算內。

example_en: The company's annual revenue increased by 15% this year.
example_zh: 公司今年的年營收增長了15%。

example_en: The finance team is reviewing the monthly expenditure report.
example_zh: 財務團隊正在審核每月支出報告。

example_en: The company's profit margin has improved significantly.
example_zh: 公司的利潤率有了顯著提升。

example_en: The company will reimburse you for your travel expenses.
example_zh: 公司將報銷您的旅費。

example_en: The store manager will check the inventory before placing a new order.
example_zh: 店長在下新訂單前會先檢查庫存。

example_en: The supplier will send an invoice for the office supplies tomorrow morning.
example_zh: 供應商明天早上將發送辦公用品的發票。

example_en: The local factory will prepare the shipment for international delivery next week.
example_zh: 當地工廠下週將準備國際快遞的出貨。

example_en: The event organizer will select a reliable food vendor for the party.
example_zh: 活動籌辦者將為派對選擇可靠的食物供應商。

example_en: You can place your order online or over the phone.
example_zh: 您可以透過網路或電話下單。

example_en: All employees must follow the established safety procedures.
example_zh: 所有員工都必須遵守既定的安全程序。

example_en: The IT department maintains all computer equipment in the building.
example_zh: IT 部門負責維護大樓內的所有電腦設備。

example_en: The job involves many administrative tasks such as filing and scheduling.
example_zh: 這份工作涉及許多行政任務，如存檔和排程。

example_en: Please ensure all documents are signed and dated before submission.
example_zh: 請確保所有文件在提交前都已簽名並標註日期。

example_en: The secretary handles all incoming and outgoing correspondence.
example_zh: 秘書處理所有來往信件。

example_en: The new training facility will open next month.
example_zh: 新的培訓設施將於下個月開放。

example_en: I'm working on a joint project with my colleagues from the finance department.
example_zh: 我正在與財務部門的同事合作一個共同專案。

example_en: The network administrator monitors system performance continuously.
example_zh: 網路管理員持續監控系統效能。

example_en: Customer information is stored securely in the central database.
example_zh: 顧客資訊安全地儲存在中央資料庫中。

example_en: You can download the software from our official website.
example_zh: 您可以從我們的官方網站下載軟體。

example_en: Please upload the files to the shared folder.
example_zh: 請將檔案上傳到共享資料夾。

example_en: The app developer will update the game software with new features monthly.
example_zh: 應用程式開發者將每月用新功能更新遊戲軟體。

example_en: Data security is a top priority for our IT department.
example_zh: 數據安全是我們 IT 部門的首要任務。

example_en: The business consultant will travel to three different cities next month.
example_zh: 商業顧問下個月將前往三個不同的城市出差。

example_en: Airline passengers must transfer to a different terminal for international flights.
example_zh: 航空乘客必須轉到不同航廈搭乘國際航班。

example_en: The assistant emailed the full travel itinerary to all conference participants.
example_zh: 助理已將完整的行程表寄給所有會議與會者。

example_en: The hotel offers luxury accommodations for business travelers.
example_zh: 這家飯店為商務旅客提供高級住宿。

example_en: She made a hotel reservation for next week's trip to Tokyo.
example_zh: 她為下週東京之行預訂了飯店。

example_en: Passengers should not leave luggage unattended at the airport.
example_zh: 乘客不應將行李無人看管地留在機場。

example_en: The hotel provides basic amenities like free Wi-Fi and breakfast.
example_zh: 飯店提供基本的便利設施，如免費 Wi-Fi 和早餐。

example_en: Guest check-in starts at 3:00 PM in the lobby.
example_zh: 客人的入住登記從下午 3 點在飯店大廳開始。

example_en: We were impressed by the warm hospitality of the hotel staff.
example_zh: 我們對飯店員工熱情的款待印象深刻。

example_en: The concierge can help you arrange local tours and restaurant bookings.
example_zh: 禮賓人員可以幫助您安排當地導覽和餐廳預訂。

example_en: Please review the insurance policy before signing.
example_zh: 簽署前請先閱讀保險單。

example_en: Does your insurance policy include coverage for travel accidents?
example_zh: 您的保險政策是否包含旅遊意外險？

example_en: The monthly premium for this health insurance is $50.
example_zh: 這份健康保險的每月保費為 50 美元。

example_en: You can file a claim for medical expenses after your surgery.
example_zh: 您可以在手術後申請醫療費用的理賠。

example_en: You will need a doctor's prescription to buy this medication.
example_zh: 您需要醫生的處方箋才能購買這種藥物。

example_en: Customer satisfaction surveys help improve service quality.
example_zh: 顧客滿意度調查有助於提升服務品質。
category: 零售與顧客服務（Retail & Customer Service）

example_en: Excellent customer service is essential for business success.
example_zh: 優質的顧客服務對企業成功至關重要。
category: 零售與顧客服務（Retail & Customer Service）

example_en: Customers can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase.
example_zh: 顧客可以在購買後 30 天內要求全額退款。
category: 零售與顧客服務（Retail & Customer Service）

example_en: The management will address all customer complaints promptly.
example_zh: 管理層將迅速處理所有客戶投訴。
category: 零售與顧客服務（Retail & Customer Service）

example_en: We value constructive feedback from our clients to improve our products.
example_zh: 我們重視客戶提供的建設性回饋，以改進我們的產品。
category: 零售與顧客服務（Retail & Customer Service）

example_en: The manufacturing industry is facing new challenges this year.
example_zh: 製造業今年正面臨新的挑戰。
category: 生產與品質管理（Manufacturing & Quality Control）

example_en: The factory increased production to meet the high demand.
example_zh: 工廠增加了產量以滿足高需求。
category: 生產與品質管理（Manufacturing & Quality Control）

example_en: Quality control is vital for maintaining product standards.
example_zh: 品質控管對於維持產品標準至關重要。
category: 生產與品質管理（Manufacturing & Quality Control）

example_en: The manufacturing process has been streamlined for better efficiency.
example_zh: 製造過程已經簡化以提高效率。
category: 生產與品質管理（Manufacturing & Quality Control）

example_en: Regular safety inspections are mandatory in all industrial facilities.
example_zh: 在所有工業設施中，定期的安全檢查都是強制性的。
category: 生產與品質管理（Manufacturing & Quality Control）

example_en: High interest rates can encourage people to save more money.
example_zh: 高利率可以鼓勵人們存更多錢。

example_en: Shareholders receive annual dividends based on company profits.
example_zh: 股東根據公司獲利領取年度股息。

example_en: A diversified investment portfolio helps reduce financial risk.
example_zh: 多元化的投資組合有助於降低財務風險。

example_en: Many people invest in the stock market to build wealth over time.
example_zh: 許多人投資股市以隨著時間累積財富。

example_en: The online banking system records every transaction automatically.
example_zh: 網路銀行系統會自動記錄每筆交易。

example_en: Please find the revised contract in the email attachment.
example_zh: 請在電子郵件附件中查看修訂後的合約。

example_en: The email subject line should be clear and concise.
example_zh: 電子郵件的主旨欄應清晰簡潔。

example_en: Please CC the department head on all project-related emails.
example_zh: 請將所有與專案相關的電子郵件副本寄送給部門主管。

example_en: I will forward your inquiry to the relevant department.
example_zh: 我將把您的詢問轉寄給相關部門。

example_en: Make sure the recipient's email address is correct before hitting send.
example_zh: 在點擊發送前，請確保收件人的電子郵件地址正確。

example_en: The changes will affect our productivity.
example_zh: 這些變化將影響我們的生產力。

example_en: The new policy had a positive effect on sales.
example_zh: 新政策對銷售產生了積極影響。

example_en: We've been working for ten hours; let's call it a day.
example_zh: 我們已經工作了十個小時；收工吧。

example_en: We need to make sure everyone is on the same page.
example_zh: 我們需要確保每個人都達成共識。
